description: Create a 'Hip Roof' plan view for an L-shaped building in LibreCAD. Use three layers: 'WALLS' (White/Color 7), 'ROOF_LINES' (Cyan/Color 4), and 'NOTES' (Yellow/Color 2). Draw the wall outline on the 'WALLS' layer as a closed polygon following coordinates (0,0) -> (12,0) -> (12,6) -> (6,6) -> (6,10) -> (0,10) -> (0,0). On the 'ROOF_LINES' layer, construct the hip roof geometry with hips and valleys at 45 degrees, including all necessary hip, valley, and ridge lines. Add text annotations 'VALLEY' and 'RIDGE' on the 'NOTES' layer near their respective features. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/hip_roof_plan.dxf.
